title: Just something funny I noticed
wikitext:
[]: Just something funny I noticed.             Quote Post by JB2448 » Mon Jan 30, 2012 1:14 am Evangelion@School is on the left, and End of Eva is on the right.

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jan 30, 2012 6:42 am O M F G they totally recycled!

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 30, 2012 8:57 am Yup, I think I posted about this a while back. Tis the single funniest moment in Petit Eva, best use of a call-back ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 30, 2012 10:14 am They forgot to give her fingernails.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 30, 2012 10:32 am Reichu wrote: They forgot to give her fingernails.

[]:             Quote Post by LeoXiao » Mon Jan 30, 2012 4:19 pm I thought that Evangelion@School was 3d and chibi?

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 30, 2012 4:23 pm LeoXiao wrote: I thought that Evangelion@School was 3d and chibi?

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 30, 2012 5:35 pm http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tTSczbOeOnY Youve gotta watch it appreciate how the EoE reference slams in from nowhere.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Mon Jan 30, 2012 5:47 pm Jayfive wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tTSczbOeOnY Youve gotta watch it appreciate how the EoE reference slams in from nowhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 30, 2012 5:57 pm BTW, I never noticed it before but the book falling on Asuka's eye is titled "世界の中心で愛を叫んだけもの/Take care of youself": [URL=http://img7.imageshack.us/img7/5135/snapshotdvd145320120130.png] [/URL] It's obviously a reference to episode 26, though they mistyped "yourself" and they wrote 愛 in kanji rather than katakana like in episode 26.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:41 pm Jayfive wrote: http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tTSczbOeOnY Youve gotta watch it appreciate how the EoE reference slams in from nowhere.

[]:             Quote Post by Hyper Shinchan » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:50 pm symbv wrote: Sounds so~~~ much~~~ fun~~~~ and there is a manga to boost too!! (3 volumes out so far)

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:51 pm symbv wrote: Sounds so~~~ much~~~ fun~~~~ and there is a manga to boost too!! (3 volumes out so far)

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:54 pm xanderkh wrote: Wait, WHAT!? THERE'S A MANGA FOR THIS!?!? I mean, I watched all of the episodes on youtube, and I love this parody series, but now I hear there's a MANGA NOW!??! Grrragh! It sucks being a westerner sometimes.

[]:             Quote Post by KingXanaduu » Mon Jan 30, 2012 9:58 pm symbv wrote: Actually the manga came FIRST. It started serialization in Shonen Ace in May 2007 while the first animation came out evn in October 2007. For more information, check http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Petit_Eva:_Evangelion@School It does not have the character introduction part though. That is only available in the Japanese wiki entry.

[]:             Quote Post by ReiAyanami25 » Tue Jan 31, 2012 1:26 am Hyper Shinchan wrote: They just re-coloured the same exact scene after all.

[]:             Quote Post by Xacebans » Tue Jan 31, 2012 9:02 am Those fingers don't look quite right... They really should have drawn them differently...

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Tue Jan 31, 2012 3:20 pm I swear, Asuka's hair color changes as often as her bust size.

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Tue Jan 31, 2012 5:20 pm CJD wrote: What in gods name did I just watch...

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Jan 31, 2012 8:03 pm ^ The second of Rei sisters there! Hurrah!! Amazingly coincidental that I found Puchi-Eva Evangelion@School merchandise right near I live just a few days after I was introduced to this Eva spinoff... http://forum.evageeks.org/post/521849/The-Gainax-Cash-Cow-or-Why-The-F-and-Did-I-Buy-That/#521849
summary:

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Mon Jan 30, 2012 6:42 am O M F G they totally recycled!

[]:             Quote Post by Jayfive » Mon Jan 30, 2012 8:57 am Yup,
